---
title: "PCAResult"
generated: true
description: "Fitted PCA basis (a NamedTuple of arrays, not a module)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.pca`](../nitrix-stats-pca.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PCAResult -->
```python
class PCAResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:PCAResult -->
Fitted PCA basis (a NamedTuple of arrays, not a module).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
